name: lzr1-pm-team
description: Product team workflow: 18 skills + 4 research agents. Pre-dev planning with 5-gate (small features) and 10-gate (large features) orchestrators, delivery roadmap generation, delivery status tracking for evidence-based progress reporting, plus standalone streaming-event-mapping discovery. Includes parallel research agents, specialized code analysis, and Product Designer.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-dev planning workflows: PRD, TRD, API design, data model, task breakdown
interface.longDescription: Structured pre-development workflow for the lzr1 team. 5-gate orchestrator for small features (<2 days) and 10-gate orchestrator for large features (≥2 days). Each gate produces a versioned artifact (research, PRD, feature-map, TRD, API design, data model, dependency map, task breakdown, subtask creation, delivery planning) with human approval between gates.
defaultPrompt: Plan a new feature using lzr1:pre-dev-feature.
Map the eventable points in this service using streaming-event-mapping.
